value.name: Allow-Corporate-Inbound-Web
value.description: Allow SAMPLE/DEMO corporate LAN access to the FAST UI and APIs via the service mesh ingress.

value.name: Allow-Mesh-To-Storage
value.description: Allow FAST workloads to reach the dedicated landing zone storage endpoint.

value.name: Allow-Mesh-To-Database
value.description: Allow FAST workloads to reach PostgreSQL in the dedicated landing zone.

value.name: Allow-Mesh-To-FileTransfer
value.description: Allow HTTPS traffic from FAST to on-premise file transfer providers.

value.name: Allow-Mesh-To-Internet-SaaS
value.description: Allow HTTPS egress to Microsoft Graph and SharePoint via the Azure Firewall.

metadata.description: Name of the Network Security Group to create.
Security rules to apply to the NSG. SAMPLE/DEMO values are expected from the environment wrappers.

input.name: [parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].name]
input.properties: [union(createObject('description', if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'description'), parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].description, 'SAMPLE/DEMO NSG rule for FAST'), 'priority', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].priority, 'direction', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].direction, 'access', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].access, 'protocol', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].protocol), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'sourcePortRange'), createObject('sourcePortRange', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].sourcePortRange), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'sourcePortRanges'), createObject('sourcePortRanges', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].sourcePortRanges), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'destinationPortRange'), createObject('destinationPortRange', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].destinationPortRange), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'destinationPortRanges'), createObject('destinationPortRanges', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].destinationPortRanges), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'sourceAddressPrefix'), createObject('sourceAddressPrefix', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].sourceAddressPrefix), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'sourceAddressPrefixes'), createObject('sourceAddressPrefixes', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].sourceAddressPrefixes), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'destinationAddressPrefix'), createObject('destinationAddressPrefix', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].destinationAddressPrefix), createObject()), if(contains(parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')], 'destinationAddressPrefixes'), createObject('destinationAddressPrefixes', parameters('securityRules')[copyIndex('securityRules')].destinationAddressPrefixes), createObject()))]

value.name: Allow-ServiceMesh-To-Storage
value.description: Allow FAST service mesh workloads to reach the storage integration subnet over HTTPS.

value.name: Allow-ServiceMesh-To-PostgreSql
value.description: Allow FAST workloads to access PostgreSQL over TCP/5432.

metadata.description: Azure region for all networking resources.
Primary address space for the virtual network.
Optional custom DNS servers for the VNET.
Subnet resources already shaped for the Microsoft.Network virtualNetworks API.
Route table resources already shaped for the Microsoft.Network routeTables API.

resources.name: [parameters('vnetName')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('addressSpace', createObject('addressPrefixes', createArray(parameters('addressSpace'))), 'subnets', parameters('subnets')), if(greater(length(parameters('dnsServers')), 0), createObject('dhcpOptions', createObject('dnsServers', parameters('dnsServers'))), createObject()))]
